title: Everything Flammable
description: Turn Minecraft into a blazing inferno — in Everything Flammable, every block can catch fire, from stone to sand to even obsidian! Lava and fire spread naturally across the world, transforming your builds and biomes into chaotic, fiery landscapes.
body:
Everything Flammable is a lightweight Forge mod for Minecraft 1.20.1 that makes every single block in the game flammable — even those that normally never burn, like stone, sand, glass, and metal.
Fire spreads across the world realistically (and dangerously!), so a single spark or a bucket of lava can quickly turn into a massive firestorm.

Features:

🔥 Every block is now flammable

🌋 Lava can ignite surrounding terrain — even in the Nether

🌍 Works with modded blocks, too

⚙️ Fully client/server compatible

Perfect for chaotic survival worlds, challenge maps, or just watching the world burn.

⚠️ Warning: This mod can cause large-scale fires and potential lag in densely built worlds — use with caution (and maybe keep a water bucket handy)!

[![Available on CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available%20on-CurseForge-f16436?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/everything-flammable)
